parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
database tuple
actor "Upper\nlayer" as UpperLayer

box "IP Layer"
participant "IPv4\nlayer" as IPv4Layer
database "Routing\ntable" as RoutingTable
end box

box "IPv4 Ineterface"
participant "IPv4\ninterface" as IPv4Interface
database ARP
end box

actor "Lower\nlayer" as LowerLayer

note over tuple
IPv4.dst=192.0.2.1
IPv4.src=198.51.100.2
end note

UpperLayer -> IPv4Layer : IPdata
note right of IPv4Layer
Allocate
IPv4
header
end note

IPv4Layer -> RoutingTable : dst=192.0.2.1
RoutingTable --> IPv4Layer
IPv4Layer --> tuple

note over tuple
IPv4.oif=ifp1
IPv4.gw=198.51.100.1
end note

IPv4Layer -> IPv4Interface
IPv4Interface -> ARP : gw=198.51.100.1
note right of ARP
enqueue
packet
end note

ARP --> IPv4Interface : ARP request
IPv4Interface -> LowerLayer
LowerLayer -> IPv4Interface : ARP response
IPv4Interface -> ARP
ARP --> IPv4Interface : resolved\npackets
IPv4Interface -> IPv4Interface : send as\nsend\nthread
IPv4Interface -> LowerLayer

@enduml
```
